creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Sat, Jun 03, 2000 at 11:28:14AM -0400, jim@thehousleys.net wrote:
> diff -urN healthd/patches/patch-aa healthd.new/patches/patch-aa
> --- healthd/patches/patch-aa	Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
> +++ healthd.new/patches/patch-aa	Fri Jun  2 20:42:55 2000

Okay, you've piqued my curiousity.  Why aren't you making these changes
directly to healthd source instead of adding patches to FreeBSD's
repository?  This goes for that etc/rc.d/healthd.sh script too.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
